summary: Add standalone distribution, diverse project pilots, and a fail-closed live Hermes acceptance
description: Add standalone distribution, diverse project pilots, and a fail-closed live Hermes acceptance
acceptance: The stack installs as a uv tool with a go-workflow console command independent of a sibling checkout
Local pilot fixtures cover Python, frontend-style, and existing-repo continuation contracts with recorded metrics
Live Hermes acceptance requires a real binary, records protocol evidence, and never reports proof when unavailable

evidence.summary: 65 pytest tests, make check, check-pilots, and isolated uv tool install passed; Python/frontend/existing pilots match recorded metrics; live Hermes gate refuses unauthorized and missing-binary runs with exit 2 and creates no proof. Real proof remains NOT PROVEN on this Mac because hermes is absent and SSH host hermes is unresolved; a separate WSL evidence task follows.
